content: Mikel Merino scored a late goal to send Spain past Portugal in the round of 16 on Monday and into a FIFA World Cup quarterfinal for the first time since they won it all in 2010.

zh.title: 西班牙击败葡萄牙，自2010年来首次晋级八强
zh.summary: 西班牙在16强赛中以1-0击败葡萄牙，梅里诺打进致胜球，首次晋级世界杯八强，这是该队自2010年赢得冠军以来的首次。这粒决定性进球帮助西班牙经过艰苦的比赛挺进下一轮。

title: USMNT's World Cup dream crushed by Belgium
summary: The USMNT crashed out of the World Cup in the round of 16 against Belgium despite having Folarin Balogun available. The team's early exit continues a pattern of disappointing performances in the tournament's knockout stages.
content: Even with Folarin Balogun back up front, the United States men's national team crashed out of the World Cup in the round of 16 once again.

zh.title: 美国队的世界杯梦想被比利时击碎
zh.summary: 美国队在16强赛中不敌比利时被淘汰出世界杯，尽管福拉林·巴洛贡仍可参赛。球队的早期出局延续了其在锦标赛淘汰赛阶段表现不佳的模式。

title: Pulisic forced off injured for USMNT vs. Belgium
summary: Christian Pulisic was substituted out with an injury during the second half of the USMNT's World Cup round of 16 loss to Belgium. His exit further hampered an already struggling American team on the pitch.
content: Christian Pulisic was forced off with an injury in the second half of the United States' World Cup round of 16 loss  against Belgium.

zh.title: 普利西奇因伤被换下场，美国队对比利时
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂安·普利西奇在美国队与比利时16强赛中因伤在下半场被换下。他的离场进一步削弱了本已困难的美国队。

title: Ronaldo exits in tears as Spain end final World Cu...
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup career ended with an emotional exit as Portugal lost 1-0 to Spain in the round of 16. The veteran striker stated he maintained a clear conscience despite the disappointing conclusion to his final World Cup.
content: An emotional Cristiano Ronaldo said he had a "clear conscience" as he exited his final World Cup as Portugal were eliminated 1-0 by Spain in the round of 16 in Arlington, Texas, on Monday.

zh.title: 罗纳尔多泪水涟涟离场，西班牙结束最后的世界杯
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多的世界杯生涯以情感化的退场而告终，葡萄牙在16强中以0:1不敌西班牙。这位资深前锋表示，尽管最后一次世界杯以令人失望的方式结束，但他问心无愧。

title: MVP Rodri shines, seeks more from Spain in QFs
summary: Spain's Rodri was named MVP of the Portugal match but cautioned the team still has room for improvement as they advance to the World Cup quarterfinals. The midfielder's stellar performance helped secure Spain's passage to the next round.
content: Spain midfielder Rodri was named the best player in his team's 1-0 victory over Portugal but warned they still have "room for improvement" ahead of the World Cup quarterfinals

zh.title: MVP罗德里闪耀，期待西班牙在四分之一决赛中更进一步
zh.summary: 西班牙中场罗德里被评为对阵葡萄牙比赛的最佳球员，但他警告球队在晋级世界杯四分之一决赛时仍有进步空间。这位中场球员的出色表现帮助西班牙晋级下一轮。

title: Mbappé: Paraguay senator remarks spread racism
summary: France star Kylian Mbappé publicly called out racist remarks made by a Paraguay senator, condemning discrimination at the World Cup. The player's statement highlighted ongoing issues with inappropriate conduct affecting the tournament.
content: France star Kylian Mbappé on Monday spoke out against racist comments made by a Paraguay senator.

zh.title: 姆巴佩：巴拉圭参议员言论传播种族主义
zh.summary: 法国球星基利安·姆巴佩公开谴责巴拉圭一名参议员的种族歧视言论，谴责世界杯上的歧视行为。这位球员的声明突显了影响本届赛事的不当行为的持续问题。

title: Giuliani: FIFA review won't affect USMNT legacy
summary: The White House's World Cup task force chief Andrew Giuliani said FIFA's reduction of Folarin Balogun's suspension will not damage the credibility or legacy of the USMNT's performance. His comments addressed concerns over the controversial disciplinary decision.
content: Andrew Giuliani, the head of the White House task force on the World Cup, told ESPN on Monday that he has no concerns at all over FIFA's decision to reduce Folarin Balogun's suspension affecting the legacy or credibility of what the USMNT accomplishes.

zh.title: 朱利安尼：国际足联审查不会影响美国足球队遗产
zh.summary: 白宫世界杯工作组负责人安德鲁·朱利安尼表示，国际足联对福拉林·巴洛贡禁赛的减轻不会损害美国足球队表现的信誉和遗产。他的评论涉及对这一有争议的纪律决定的担忧。

title: 🏆2026-27 UCL season begins mid-World Cup
summary: The 2026-27 Champions League season will begin just 38 days after the previous season's final, overlapping with World Cup play. The compressed timeline will feature many lesser-known clubs competing alongside traditional powerhouses.
content: The new Champions League campaign begins 38 days after last season's final. Plenty of unheralded clubs are involved, all with their own fascinating stories.

zh.title: 🏆2026-27欧冠赛季在世界杯期间开始
zh.summary: 2026-27赛季欧洲冠军联赛将在上赛季决赛后仅38天开始，与世界杯比赛重叠。紧凑的赛程将包括许多不太知名的俱乐部与传统强队并肩竞争。

title: Belgium make light work of US to set up quarter-final tie with Spain
summary: Belgium easily defeated a defensively weak United States team to advance to the World Cup quarterfinals against Spain, despite controversy surrounding Folarin Balogun's delayed suspension. The European side's convincing performance overshadowed the off-field drama.
content: Belgium ease past a defensively sloppy USA in a match shrouded in controversy surrounding Folarin Balogun's delayed suspension, a scandal that made little impact on the pitch.

zh.title: 比利时轻松击败美国，为与西班牙的四分之一决赛铺路
zh.summary: 比利时轻松击败防守较弱的美国队，晋级世界杯四分之一决赛对阵西班牙，尽管围绕福拉林·巴洛贡延迟禁赛存在争议。欧洲球队令人信服的表现掩盖了场外的风波。

title: 'Total calamity!' US gift Belgium a third goal
summary: USA goalkeeper Matt Freese's critical error gifted Belgium's Hans Vanaken an easy goal during the round of 16 match. Additional defensive breakdowns compounded the collapse as Belgium took control of the game.
content: USA goalkeeper Matt Freese with a huge error in judgement as he gifts Belgium's Hans Vanaken the ball, leaving him with an easy finish that defender Tim Ream could've done more to stop. Errors all around as Belgium take control of the round of 16 tie.

zh.title: "完全灾难！"美国送给比利时第三球
zh.summary: 美国门将马特·弗里斯的致命错误使比利时的汉斯·范阿肯轻松进球，这发生在16强比赛中。防线的进一步崩溃加剧了局面恶化，比利时随后控制了比赛。

title: Ronaldo's World Cup career ends with a whimper as ...
summary: Spain's late goal eliminated Portugal and ended Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup career on an emotional note. The veteran's exit closed the chapter on a legendary international player's time on football's biggest stage.
content: Spain's late winner knocked out Portugal and closed the book on Cristiano Ronaldo's time on the world's biggest stage.

zh.title: 罗纳尔多世界杯生涯以遗憾结束
zh.summary: 西班牙的后期进球淘汰了葡萄牙，克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多的世界杯生涯以情感化的方式结束。这位老将的退出结束了这位足坛传奇人物在最大舞台上的时代。

title: World Cup updates: Merino delivers late winner as ...
summary: Spain advanced to the World Cup quarterfinals as Mikel Merino scored a decisive late-game winner against Portugal in the round of 16. The dramatic conclusion secured Spain's passage and eliminated the Portuguese from the tournament.
content: null

zh.title: 世界杯更新：梅里诺打入后期制胜球
zh.summary: 西班牙在16强中面对葡萄牙的比赛里，通过米克尔·梅里诺的关键后期进球，成功晋级世界杯八强。这场戏剧性的比赛确保了西班牙的晋级，并将葡萄牙淘汰出局。
